profile_summary_table.main_signal_priority: vector semantics + topic/management/prevention aliases; KG prevention/management context is supporting evidence.
profile_summary_table.risk_if_misclassified: Topic aliases are sparse; generic biosecurity documents may outrank emergency or management-specific documents.

profile_summary_table.main_signal_priority: KG disease facts + metadata disease + vector; disease evidence should dominate.
profile_summary_table.risk_if_misclassified: Missing disease aliases can let species/vector similarity outrank disease-specific evidence.

profile_summary_table.main_signal_priority: production_mode metadata + species + vector; KG mode and hatchery intent guardrails are important.
profile_summary_table.risk_if_misclassified: Hatchery/life-stage misses can mix grow-out, disease, and hatchery documents.

profile_summary_table.main_signal_priority: location metadata/KG + lexical exact terms + vector; guardrails should protect local aquaculture intent.
profile_summary_table.risk_if_misclassified: Sparse location facts or missing local aliases can make exact local documents depend on lexical/vector luck.

profile_summary_table.main_signal_priority: metadata species/location + vector; KG location/taxon facts and intent guardrails are secondary.
profile_summary_table.risk_if_misclassified: Location or species miss can cause broad shrimp/aquaculture documents to outrank country-specific documents.
